name: Mayor Jerry Generazzo
description:
Fighting again with the mayor of Beaverton.

Idk. He was kinda hot so… just don’t ask ok?!

dead dove is there because he did try to “punish” me when I tested him out I tried to make it so he won’t do that on his own cause that is not my intent with this bot but hey… you do you if that’s what you like. Ain’t my business. Just no minor shit, alright?
